'''Scurry''' was a young [[Ferbil/Legends|ferbil]] native to [[Kegan/Legends|Kegan]]. It was one of [[V-Davi]]'s two pet ferbils. Owning pets was forbidden in Kegan, so when [[O-Bin]] discovered it, she ordered [[V-Tarz]] to eliminate Scurry, along with V-Davi's other baby ferbil and two [[Lizard/Legends|lizards]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Jedi Apprentice: The Fight for Truth]]''
